description_long: This object is a single, medium-sized banana with a gently curved shape and a slightly thickened stem. The peel is predominantly yellow with scattered brown speckles and some areas of light bruising, especially along the sides and near the tip. The stem is dark brown and somewhat shriveled, indicating it has been detached from a bunch for some time. The banana's surface is matte with a subtle sheen, and the skin appears intact with no visible tears or splits. The bottom end is rounded and slightly flattened, while the curvature of the fruit is smooth and even. No commercial stickers or labels are visible on the peel.
description: A medium, curved yellow banana with brown speckles, a darkened stem, and an intact, slightly bruised peel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the banana's full curve, yellow peel with brown spots, and a dark, shriveled stem.
description_view_1: Angled view from the stem end, highlighting the elongated body and the rounded tip of the banana.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, displaying the smooth curve, yellow skin, and some light bruising along the side.
description_view_3: View from the bottom end, emphasizing the thickness of the banana and the transition from the tip to the stem.
attribute_peel_condition: The banana's peel is intact with no visible tears or splits, but there are scattered brown speckles and some light bruising along the sides. The surface texture appears slightly rough in places, especially near the stem and tip.
